perf_hint: one hash and one blob per pixel — the cheapest overlay avz ships; note that heavy grain fights the encoder, so raise `--quality` (lower CRF) if the grain smears

params.name: grain
params.description: How strong the film grain is.

params.name: cadence
params.description: How many times per second the grain re-rolls; 24 is cine.

params.name: shimmer
params.description: How much the air band roughens the grain.

params.name: leak
params.description: How strong the wandering light leak is; 0 is grain alone.

params.name: leak_size
params.description: How wide the leak blooms, as a fraction of the short edge.

params.name: drift
params.description: How fast the leak wanders its closed path.

params.name: warmth
params.description: Where on the palette the leak's light sits.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much the loudness of the song lifts the whole overlay.
